title: Inverted scale mobs
description: This datapack inverts mob sizes, giving them their opposite scale. It can be quite funny and is perfect if you're looking for something to test out in a video
body:
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab11aa799dbfa8c6f60e3ee9303ce72fda1d23c1.png)

### THIS DATAPACK INVIERTS MOB SIZES ###
this datapack inverts mobs sizes giving them their opposite scale. It can be quite funny and is perfect if you're looking for something to test out in a video

- **This includes ALL the latest mobs from the most recent Minecraft update**
Bringing the total to 81 modified entities
